# Pictelio (pixivizer)

> A third-party Pixiv illustration browser built with SolidJS, packaged as a native Android app with Capacitor.

## Key features

- **Feed**: Recommended illustrations feed with virtual scrolling
- **Illust Detail**: Full-size illustration viewer with zoom and pan
- **Login**: Pixiv OAuth login
- **Bookmarks**: Manage bookmarked illustrations
- **Personal Center**: User profile and settings
- **Settings**: Theme (light/dark/system), proxy configuration, language
- **Search**: Tab-based feed search
- **User Illusts**: Browse illustrations by specific users
- **Age Confirmation**: Age verification gate
- **Debug Image**: Image debugging tool

## Links

- Homepage: https://a1121611810.github.io/pixivizer/
- Privacy Policy: /privacy-policy.html
- GitHub: https://github.com/a1121611810/pixivizer

## Tech stack

- SolidJS 1.9 (UI framework)
- Vite 8 (build tool)
- TypeScript 6
- UnoCSS 66 (utility-first CSS)
- Capacitor 8 (native Android wrapper)
- pixiv-api (third-party Pixiv API integration)
